User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a registered user profile, tracking their onboarding role and core meta info.

email.description: User email address matching their Firebase Auth credentials.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was generated.

role.description: The workspace setup role. If null, the user has not completed role selection.

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user completed onboarding steps.

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user configuration records keyed by Firebase Auth unique UID.
